name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Join the Movement
body:
Trump - Make America Great Again!
| |
---
| | [](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zjkzjt-drdiuiutjh-r/)
---

| |
---
[www.DonaldJTrump.com](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zjkzjt-drdiuiutjh-y/)
| |
---
\- October 20 2015 -
Join the Movement

| Dear Peter Willis, Every day we are gaining momentum. We have been on top in the polls for **over 100 days straight**. We are polling at our [highest numbers ever](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zjkzjt-drdiuiutjh-j/). Morning Consult puts us with 51% nationwide counting votes for second choice. It's incredible. CNN puts us at 27%. In New Hampshire we are at 28% - over a dozen points ahead of 2nd place. We are beating everyone - [even in their home states.](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zjkzjt-drdiuiutjh-t/) [](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zjkzjt-drdiuiutjh-i/)We are gaining momentum and gaining support. 8,000 people came to Anderson, SC to hear our message. It broke the all time venue record. The crowd was incredible - veterans, students, parents, and great Americans from every kind of background joined us.

_Attendees in Anderson, SC_

**Tomorrow evening I 'll be at the Burlington Memorial Auditorium in Iowa. Get your tickets **[**here**](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zjkzjt-drdiuiutjh-d/)**.**
This weekend I'll be making 2 stops in Florida. On Friday we'll be at the Trump National Doral in Miami at 7pm. Tickets can be reserved [here](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zjkzjt-drdiuiutjh-h/).
On Saturday at noon we'll be at the Jacksonville Landing. It's going to be a huge event - don't miss it. Get your ticket [here](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zjkzjt-drdiuiutjh-k/). As we continue to bring our message across America we hope you'll join us on one of our campaign stops. Next week we'll be heading to Colorado for a [two hour](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zjkzjt-drdiuiutjh-u/) Republican Debate.
We look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail as together we Make America Great Again!
---

Donald J. Trump

[Forward to a friend](http://donaldtrumpcampaign.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-drdiuiutjh-E524705E-zjkzjt-l-x)

PS: Let us know you've joined the movement #TeamTrump16

| Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.
[info@donaldtrump.com](mailto:info@donaldtrump.com)
---

---
|
---
|
---
|
---

name: Dave Abrams
subject: Do you know what today is?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
It's official "Back to the Future" Day.

There are a lot of things Marty McFly got right: video conferencing, hands-free gaming, and even video glasses!
But, one of the predictions is still outstanding: will the Cubs win the World Series like Marty predicted?
We're interested in which team our supporters would like to see in the World Series:
**[<<< Donate $5 or more to the campaign here for the Chicago Cubs >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44524475:JK3of2LN0:m:1:1516426255:D3038046A0BC8370C147B0AA55FD00D1:r)**
**[<<< Donate $5 or more to the campaign here for the New York Mets >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44524476:JK3of2LN0:m:1:1516426255:D3038046A0BC8370C147B0AA55FD00D1:r)**
**[<<< Donate $5 or more to the campaign here if you don't care about baseball and want Marty's flying car prediction to come true >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44524477:JK3of2LN0:m:1:1516426255:D3038046A0BC8370C147B0AA55FD00D1:r)**

And don't worry, it's ok if you're on Marty's side -- we won't tell the Gov!
Dave

****

name: John Kasich
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

Every single American has a **$57,200+** share of our runaway national debt.

I'm the only candidate with a plan to balance the federal budget. I know we can balance the budget because I'm also the only candidate who has balanced the federal budget before.

With your support, we can do it again.

**[Peter, will you chip in $25, $50 or more today to help us get this message out?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31149004:Wzsgj5mzN:m:1:958431888:3520C5F631832E11E975B455E780BF7A:r)**

**Here's a short video about my plan that you can share on social media:**

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31149005:Wzsgj5mzN:m:1:958431888:3520C5F631832E11E975B455E780BF7A:r)

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31149006:Wzsgj5mzN:m:1:958431888:3520C5F631832E11E975B455E780BF7A:r)

[Your generous contribution will not only help us get this message out](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31149004:Wzsgj5mzN:m:1:958431888:3520C5F631832E11E975B455E780BF7A:r), but also continue building out the organization across the country that will ensure we win the primary and can go on to defeat Hillary!

Thank you for all that you're doing to help.

-John

**John Kasich
**Governor of Ohio
[JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31149007:Wzsgj5mzN:m:1:958431888:3520C5F631832E11E975B455E780BF7A:r)

P.S. Since you began reading this email, your share of the National debt has grown. Let's do something about it! [JohnKasich.com/Donate

name: Rand Paul
subject: you should be the first to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Supporter,

I wanted you to be one of the first to hear
about our team's #100DaysToVictory Initiative.

Saturday marks 100 days until the Iowa
caucuses and 108 days until the New Hampshire primary, so we are
launching a massive grassroots push nationwide.

We need your help!

Team Rand will coordinate door-knocking and
phone-banking in all 50 states starting this Saturday.

The mainstream media -- desperate to push
party establishment picks and turn this campaign into a TV
reality show -- wants nothing more than to blac kout our message
of liberty.

That's why it's important that WE spread our
positive message of liberty, freedom, and prosperity across the
nation.

Supporter, can I count on you to join this
massive effort? Visit our website to RSVP for the
#100DaysToVictory Initiative.

My plan for America includes:

A 14.5% Flat Tax that eliminates
corporate welfare;
Balancing the budget in 5 years - I have
identified specific cuts to spending;
Term limits to get rid of the career
politicians;
Requiring Congress to Read the Bills
before voting on them;
Making Congress live by the laws they
pass;
Following Ronald Reagan's doctrine of
"peace through strength," which ensures that America has a
military that is second to none, but does not use it for
unnecessary foreign intervention.

My campaign isn't backed by the Washington
insiders or Wall Street elite, it is fueled by everyday folks
like yourself.

Your participation is crucial to our success!
Please RSVP at randpaul.com/100days and a member from my team
will be in touch shortly.

Thank you for your steadfast support.

In Liberty,

Rand

PS: If you can't help out with the
#100DaysToVictory Initiative, will you make a contribution today?

Your generous donation will help us supply
our volunteers with the vital tools needed in the field to spread
our message of liberty and limited-government. Click here to make
your secure contribution of $250, $100, $50, $35 or any amount
that you can afford today.

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWcVqs5mNp

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWcVqs5mNp

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-29865479115-echo3-580A1915855128261CB5BDE749CD956A@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

----Powered by Paramount Communication----
http://www.paramountcommunication.com

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Virginia/DC Volunteer Update
body:
Trump - Make America Great Again!
| |
---
| | [](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zjkjuhk-drdiuiutjh-r/)
---

| |
---
[www.DonaldJTrump.com](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zjkjuhk-drdiuiutjh-y/)
| |
---
\- October 20, 2015 -
Time to Turn in!

| Dear Peter Willis, **_Time to Return Petitions_**

Thank you, to all the volunteers collecting signatures on the petitions to qualify Mr. Trump for the ballot. It does not matter if you have one signature or one thousand one, we want them all! Please have your sheets notarized and mail them in as soon as possible. Sheets are due by October 30th so we can process them for submission.

Donald Trump for President
10015 West Broad St.
Glen Allen, VA 23060

You may continue collecting on blank sheets until we call a stop, but please submit all signatures you currently have. If you have questions please e-mail [Dena@DonaldTrump.com](mailto:Dena@DonaldTrump.com).

**_Volunteer Trainings_**

As we move to the next phase, now is the perfect time to join the campaign as a volunteer. Help us elect Mr. Trump as president to Make America Great Again! Notaries will be available at the trainings to notarize and collect petitions from anyone who is already circulating.
**Bristol**
Wednesday, 10/21
[See Details & Register as a Bristol Volunteer

](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zjkjuhk-drdiuiutjh-j/)**Blacksburg**

[See Details & Register as a Blacksburg Volunteer

[See Details & Register as a Charlottesville Volunteer

**Monday, 10/26
[See Details & Register as a NoVA Volunteer

**Tuesday, 10/27
[See Details & Register as a Winchester Volunteer

](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zjkjuhk-drdiuiutjh-k/)**Chesapeake
**Wednesday, 10/28
[See Details & Register as a Hampton Roads Volunteer

](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zjkjuhk-drdiuiutjh-u/)**Hampton
**Thursday, 10/29
[See Details & Register as a Hampton Roads Volunteer

](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zjkjuhk-drdiuiutjh-o/)**Virginia Beach
**Friday, 10/30
[See Details & Register as a Hampton Roads Volunteer

](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zjkjuhk-drdiuiutjh-b/)If you are not able to attend one of these, please join our active volunteer list by registering for a ticket at this site: [https://www.eventbrite.com/e/donald-trump-for-pres...](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zjkjuhk-drdiuiutjh-n/) This will ensure that you are informed of all the volunteer activities in your area.

name: Katie McGinty
subject: Our kids deserve better
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
body:
Friend --

This campaign is about so many things, but I like to think that it all comes down to how together we can build the best future for our nation's kids.

A critical part of that is education, and our students deserve the best. But rising tuition costs and skyrocketing student debt are robbing Pennsylvania kids of the chance they need to get ahead in today’s economy.

Here in Pennsylvania we have some of the greatest colleges and universities in the world. It’s our responsibility to ensure that our students are able to access the best education possible -- and that they aren’t saddled with crippling debt for the rest of their lives.

Every student should have the opportunity to attend college or trade school without fear of undue financial burden. Add your name today to say it's time to make college affordable for our kids.

https://act.myngp.com/Forms/-712412066543042560?ms=e20151021u&refcode=e20151021u&amount=10

For me, college wasn't just a dream -- it was a possibility. But for too many families across Pennsylvania today, inflated tuition costs and student debt put higher education out of reach.

Of course it’s no surprise that extreme right-wing reactionaries like Pat Toomey are part of the problem.

Pat Toomey has repeatedly blocked legislation that would have helped middle class kids get the education they deserve without shackling them to student loans they can never afford to repay. He’s even voted -- twice -- against a bill that would have provided tuition relief for Pennsylvania’s veterans.

Can I count on you to stand with me and demand more for Pennsylvania students?

Our students deserve better! Sign your name today and say you'll be a part of this fight to make college affordable.

https://act.myngp.com/Forms/-712412066543042560?ms=e20151021u&refcode=e20151021u&amount=10

Thank you for your support,

Katie

DONATE

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/km-founding-member?refcode=e201510201&amount=15

----------------------------------------------
| Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
----------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please https://act.myngp.com/el/5407767724388515840/8303814178661990400.

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Adam Parkhomenko, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: You don’t want to miss this event:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Hillary is coming to your neighborhood! | Friend --

This Friday, Hillary is headed to Alexandria to meet with folks, lay out her vision for our country, and thank everyone for their continued support!

We’re in the middle of a huge moment for this campaign -- with the debate last week and the first contests just barely 100 days away, we have to keep up the momentum.

**[You should be there on Friday. Here are the details:](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM3OTc0NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMDgxNzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

**WHAT:** Grassroots organizing meeting with
Hillary Clinton and Governor Terry McAuliffe
**WHEN:** Friday, October 23rd, 2015
11:00 a.m. - 2:00 p.m.
**WHERE:** Alexandria Market Square
301 King Street
Alexandria, Virginia 22314

**[Yes, I'll be there.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjM3OTc0NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMDgxNzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

[I can't make it, but I'll still volunteer! ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM3OTc0NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMDgxNzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0) **
You’ll hear from Hillary herself, and Virginia Governor Terry McAuliffe will be there, too. This is an opportunity you won’t want to miss.

**Space is limited. RSVP now:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/meet-hillary-in-alexandria/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjM3OTc0NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMDgxNzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Adam

Adam Parkhomenko
Director of Grassroots Engagement
Hillary for America

---
******Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjM3OTc0NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMDgxNzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjM3OTc0NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMDgxNzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM3OTc0NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMDgxNzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM3OTc0NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMDgxNzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjM3OTc0NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMDgxNzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjM3OTc0NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMDgxNzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjM3OTc0NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMDgxNzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
clean_body: Hillary is coming to your neighborhood! | Friend -- This Friday, Hillary is headed to Alexandria to meet with folks, lay out her vision for our country, and thank everyone for their continued support! We’re in the middle of a huge moment for this campaign -- with the debate last week and the first contests just barely 100 days away, we have to keep up the momentum. WHAT: Grassroots organizing meeting with Hillary Clinton and Governor Terry McAuliffe WHEN: Friday, October 23rd, 2015 11:00 a.m. - 2:00 p.m. WHERE: Alexandria Market Square 301 King Street Alexandria, Virginia 22314 You’ll hear from Hillary herself, and Virginia Governor Terry McAuliffe will be there, too. This is an opportunity you won’t want to miss. Space is limited. RSVP now: Thanks, Adam Adam Parkhomenko Director of Grassroots Engagement Hillary for America ****Did someone forward this email to you? | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

name: Ben Carson
subject: Peter, will it be you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31153168:WDCJ15mNy:m:1:876315805:C9C42EC46AB10DFBC43C2548AE3F2A08:r)
---
|

Peter,
Back in June we held a "Lunch with Ben" sweepstakes where one supporter got the chance to join me for a private lunch on the campaign trail. |
---
Our winner was Candace Salamone from Charlotte, North Carolina and she brought along her 12-year-old son.

We had a great time, and I'm really glad we made the time to do it.

We've now decided to do it again and a new supporter, chosen at random, will have the chance to join me on the campaign trail for a private one-on-one lunch. **Will it be you?**

[**If you donate $5 or more right now, you'll be automatically entered for a chance to win.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31153168:WDCJ15mNy:m:1:876315805:C9C42EC46AB10DFBC43C2548AE3F2A08:r)

If you're chosen as the winner, my campaign will handle all of the transportation and accommodations -- flights, hotel, everything.

It'll be a great opportunity to chat, to get to know one another, and talk about our desire to heal, inspire and revive our great nation.

[**So what do you say Peter, will you donate $5 or more now for the chance to sit down and share a meal with me?**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31153168:WDCJ15mNy:m:1:876315805:C9C42EC46AB10DFBC43C2548AE3F2A08:r)

Thank you for your ongoing support. I truly appreciate it.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

**

NO PAYMENT OR CONTRIBUTION OF ANY KIND IS REQUIRED TO WIN THIS SWEEPSTAKES** and any payment or contribution will not increase your odds of winning this sweepstakes. You may enter sweepstakes without donating by [clicking here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31153169:WDCJ15mNy:m:1:876315805:C9C42EC46AB10DFBC43C2548AE3F2A08:r). The FULL OFFICIAL RULES for "LUNCH WITH BEN" [can be read here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31153170:WDCJ15mNy:m:1:876315805:C9C42EC46AB10DFBC43C2548AE3F2A08:r). One winner, randomly chosen by the committee will receive the following prize: Roundtrip airfare for winner and a guest to a yet-to-be determined location of the committee's choosing, and one night in a hotel. The contest is open to citizens of any of the 50 states, Puerto Rico and the District of Columbia, and permanent residents who hold green cards, who are 18 years or older or have reached the age of majority as defined by state law. This sweepstakes is sponsored by Carson America, Inc. Void where prohibited. The Commonwealth of Virginia is the jurisdiction for resolution of any legal challenges.

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31153168:WDCJ15mNy:m:1:876315805:C9C42EC46AB10DFBC43C2548AE3F2A08:r)
---
|
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31153171:WDCJ15mNy:m:1:876315805:C9C42EC46AB10DFBC43C2548AE3F2A08:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31153172:WDCJ15mNy:m:1:876315805:C9C42EC46AB10DFBC43C2548AE3F2A08:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31153173:WDCJ15mNy:m:1:876315805:C9C42EC46AB10DFBC43C2548AE3F2A08:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31153174:WDCJ15mNy:m:1:876315805:C9C42EC46AB10DFBC43C2548AE3F2A08:r)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Jindal?=
subject: Two bad choices
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jindal For President
body:
|
---
| | Joe Biden just announced he is not running for President.

That means the Democrats will most likely nominate a socialist or a candidate who is under FBI investigation.

[That would be devastating for America, and we can’t let it happen.](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=ea18703901&e=724c64cfa7)

Instead of moving to the middle like the DC establishment wants, now is the time to embrace our conservative principles. That’s what I have done as Governor of Louisiana, and that is what I will do as President.

**The reason I know we will win is simple: our ideas are better.** It’s time for the DC establishment to stop being embarrassed by conservative principles, and to start to fight for them.

[Donate $100, $50 or $25 right now to help assure we don’t have a socialist or a Clinton in the White House.](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=c0dd59212a&e=724c64cfa7)

Thank you,
Bobby

[](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=b17bafabf5&e=724c64cfa7)

---
| | | Paid for by Jindal For President
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2015 JINDAL FOR PRESIDENT, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email as a supporter of Bobby Jindal

**Our mailing address is:**
JINDAL FOR PRESIDENTP.O. BOX 5101BATON ROUGE, LA 70821
[Add us to your address book](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage2.com/vcard?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=36e884e022)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage1.com/profile?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=36e884e022&e=724c64cfa7) or [unsubscribe from this list](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=36e884e022&e=724c64cfa7&c=97e54713cb)
